name: Sila Realty Trust Inc. Common Stock
summary: Sila Realty Trust, Inc. is a net lease real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on investing in high-quality healthcare properties and data centers. The company's portfolio includes freestanding medical office buildings, hospitals, and other healthcare facilities, as well as data centers leased to creditworthy tenants. Sila Realty Trust is based in Tampa, Florida.
